body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This implements #1305 

This PR removes all namelist functionality, replacing it with calls to ClimaParameters. This includes the whole `generate_namelist ` file and all usage of `parse_namelist`. 

The existing `TurbulenceConvectionParameters` struct has been expanded to include all former namelist parameters. This includes a few microphysics parameters as well. In most cases where `namelist` is passed in, I have just replaced it with the expanded struct.

This replaces PR #1311.
Closes #1305 

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Replace namelist usage, expand TCParams struct

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
This PR replaces `Y.c.q_rai` with `Y.c.ρq_rai` and `Y.c.q_sno` with `Y.c.ρq_sno`. This allows ClimaAtmos's tracer advection to work correctly for rain and snow, since it assumes that every tracer is represented by a variable of the form `Y.c.ρc`. Closes #1390. Prelude to #1391.

## Content
- Fixes the advection of rain and snow at terminal velocity. This tendency was previously implemented as `cₜ = ᶜdivᵥ(ᶠright_bias(ρc * terminal_velocity)) / ρ`, which is only correct for anelastic models, where `ρₜ` is 0. Now, it will be implemented as `ρcₜ = ᶜdivᵥ(ᶠright_bias(ρc * terminal_velocity))`, which is generically correct.
- Fixes the sources/sinks for rain and snow. These tendencies were previously implemented as `cₜ = S * area`, which is only an approximation of the correct expression, `cₜ = S * area * (1 + c)`. Now, it will be implemented as `ρcₜ = ρ * S * area`, which is correct.

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/

- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

title: Replace q_rai and q_sno with ρq_rai and ρq_sno

body:
## Purpose 
Implements face-valued reconstruction of velocities for application in the momentum tendency expressions. 
Closes #1368 
Closes #1369 

## Todo
- [x] Define $\tilde{\boldsymbol{u}}$
- [x] Update horizontal tendency term 
- [x] Update vertical tendency term
- [x] Update documentation to reflect changes to equations

title: Reconstructed velocities for momentum advection terms.
